name: Iter14 — Verify delete button works in History table
description: Verify that clicking the delete (🗑️) button on a review row in the History page removes the row from the table without it reappearing.

planSteps.description: The History page loads and the reviews table is visible with at least one row
Each row has a 🗑️ delete button in the Actions column
Count the number of rows visible in the reviews table and remember it
Click the 🗑️ delete button on the last row in the table — a confirmation dialog should appear
Accept/confirm the deletion dialog by clicking OK
The deleted row disappears from the table and does NOT reappear — the row count is now one less than before
The remaining rows in the table are still visible and intact
